MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-07-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-13-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. DEPT. 503A. VINCENT SCOTTO, PRO TEM JUDGE, M. ECHEVERRIA, CLRK. NO CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: PLTF. ATTY ARNOLD W. EVJE II WITH PROPERTY SUPERVISOR LESLIE MOLINA. ALSO PRESENT, DEFT. LINDA BROWN, PRO PER. CASE SETTLED. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION APPROVED AS TO FORM AND CONTENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 VAN NESS AVENUE #276, STAYED UNTIL AUG-28-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE ON AUG. 28, 2001 PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2, 025.00.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING, INC.
